svg.text: SM_120 GB202 — Tensor Memory Access engine: descriptor-based async multi-dimensional data movement
Patent basis: US 2023/0289292 A1 (Minkin et al., NVIDIA 2023)

g.text: Dedicated HW per SM — async, decoupled from warp scheduler
5D nested-loop traversal → address generation → OOB check
Generates multiple L2 requests from single SM instruction
• Queue depth: ≥32 entries • DMA write: 16.1 B/cyc

svg.text: DMA write to smem + mbarrier arrive (bypasses RF entirely)

g.text: (Stored in global memory, set once per tensor)
(Provided by SM with each UTMALDG instruction)
No address computation by SM threads!
